It effectively promotes the decomposition of organic waste, food residues and toilet paper - thus preventing odours. The septic tank activator breaks down sediments, sludge and crusts so that the septic tank or cesspool does not need to be frequently exported and cleaned. Tierra Verde septic tank bacteria is used to start the decomposition process (when the septic tank or sewage treatment plant is first put into operation). Restores the balance in the septic tank or cesspool (after its export, after a long break in use, in case of septic tank clogging). Removes odour (bacteria and enzymes process organic waste to produce a liquid that does not smell). One dose every month is enough to prevent complications.
